data.title: Dragonfly Energy Secures Key Solid-State Battery Patent in Japan
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Dragonfly Energy Holdings Corp ( (DFLI) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 23, 2026, Dragonfly Energy Holdings Corp. announced it received an allowance from the Japan Patent Office for its patent application titled “Powderized Solid-State Electrolyte and Electroactive Materials,” marking the company’s first patent application allowance in Japan. The patent covers core innovations in powderized solid-state electrolyte and electroactive materials that underpin Dragonfly’s solid-state battery and dry electrode manufacturing platform, positioning the company to enhance solvent-free, scalable electrode production while improving safety, energy density, and manufacturing efficiency in its operations and product roadmap.

The allowance, dated April 23, 2026, underscores Dragonfly Energy’s progress in international intellectual property protection for its solid-state battery technologies. By securing recognition of these materials innovations in Japan, the company strengthens its technological footing in a key global market and signals potential future benefits for its competitive positioning and stakeholders interested in advanced, safer, and more efficient energy storage solutions.

The most recent analyst rating on (DFLI) stock is a Buy with a $5.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Dragonfly Energy Holdings Corp stock, see the DFLI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on DFLI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, DFLI is a Neutral.

The score is weighed down primarily by weak financial performance (large ongoing losses and persistent cash burn), with valuation also pressured due to unprofitability and no dividend. Technicals remain broadly weak versus longer-term moving averages, while the cost-cutting corporate action provides a modest offset by targeting improved cost structure.

To see Spark’s full report on DFLI stock, click here.

More about Dragonfly Energy Holdings Corp

Dragonfly Energy Holdings Corp. operates in the advanced battery technology industry, focusing on the development of solid-state batteries and dry electrode manufacturing platforms. Its work centers on innovative electrolyte and electroactive material technologies aimed at improving safety, energy density, and manufacturing efficiency for scalable battery production.

data.title: PulteGroup Reports Lower Q1 Earnings Amid Housing Headwinds
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from PulteGroup ( (PHM) ).

PulteGroup reported first quarter 2026 results on April 23, with net income falling to $347 million, or $1.79 per share, from $523 million, or $2.57 per share, a year earlier as home sale revenues declined 12% to $3.3 billion. The builder saw a 7% drop in closing volumes and a 5% decrease in average selling price, while gross margin narrowed to 24.4% amid higher incentives used to address competitive pressures and clear excess spec inventory.

Despite softer earnings, net new orders rose 3% to 8,034 homes worth $4.6 billion, and community count increased 9%, lifting quarter-end backlog to 10,427 homes valued at $6.5 billion, highlighting underlying demand for homeownership despite affordability concerns. PulteGroup invested $1.3 billion in land acquisition and development, repurchased $308 million of stock, and its board approved a $1.5 billion increase in share repurchase authorization to $2.1 billion remaining, signaling confidence in long-term prospects and continued shareholder returns supported by a low 12.3% debt-to-capital ratio and $1.8 billion in cash.

The most recent analyst rating on (PHM) stock is a Buy with a $140.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on PulteGroup stock, see the PHM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PHM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PHM is a Outperform.

The score is primarily driven by strong underlying financial performance (profitability and a conservative balance sheet) and supportive technical uptrend. It is tempered by cash-flow volatility and softer near-term outlook signals from the earnings call (elevated incentives, higher lot costs, and reduced 2026 cash flow guidance), while valuation remains reasonable but with a low dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on PHM stock, click here.

More about PulteGroup

PulteGroup, Inc., based in Atlanta, is one of the largest U.S. homebuilders, operating in more than 45 markets nationwide. Through brands including Centex, Pulte Homes, Del Webb, DiVosta Homes and John Wieland Homes and Neighborhoods, it targets multiple buyer segments and adapts its product mix to shifting consumer demand in the housing market.

The company focuses on building residential communities where it aims to balance affordability and design, while leveraging scale and a broad geographic footprint. Its diversified brand portfolio allows it to serve first-time, move-up and active adult buyers, supporting resilience across housing cycles and regional economic conditions.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $24.65B

data.title: Qunabox Reshapes Board as Sales Chief Steps Down and Veteran Executive Tapped as Director
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Qunabox Group Limited ( (HK:0917) ).

Qunabox Group Limited announced that executive director Cao Liwen will resign from the board with effect from April 23, 2026, to concentrate on managing the group’s sales department while remaining its vice president of sales. The board emphasized there was no disagreement linked to his departure and thanked him for his contribution.

To fill the resulting vacancy, the board has proposed appointing senior vice president Qian Jun as an executive director, subject to shareholder approval at the May 22, 2026 annual general meeting. Qian, who has overseen business operations since joining the group in 2013 and holds significant share interests via an acting-in-concert arrangement, is expected to sign a three-year service contract with remuneration aligned to his responsibilities and market conditions, signaling continuity in leadership and governance.

More about Qunabox Group Limited

Qunabox Group Limited is a Cayman Islands-incorporated company listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. The group operates through various subsidiaries and focuses on technology-driven businesses, with senior management experienced in software engineering, information technology and business operations in mainland China.

Average Trading Volume: 4,899,808

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$4.24B

data.title: West Bancorporation Posts Strong Q1 2026 Earnings, Dividend
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

West Bancorporation ( (WTBA) ) has provided an announcement.

West Bancorporation, Inc., headquartered in West Des Moines, Iowa, is the parent of community bank West Bank, which has served customers since 1893. The bank focuses on lending, deposit and trust services for small- to medium-sized businesses and consumers, operating branches in the Des Moines and Coralville markets in Iowa and four cities in Minnesota, including Rochester and St. Cloud.

The company’s regional community banking model positions it to compete for relationship-based commercial and retail clients. Its franchise emphasizes balance-sheet strength, credit quality and core deposit gathering across its Midwestern footprint, supporting stable earnings and consistent capital returns to shareholders through regular dividends.

West Bancorporation, Inc. reported first quarter 2026 net income of $10.6 million, or $0.61 per diluted share, up from $7.4 million in the fourth quarter of 2025 and $7.8 million a year earlier, reflecting a 34.8 percent year-over-year profit increase as net interest margin expanded. On April 22, 2026, the board declared a regular quarterly dividend of $0.25 per share, payable May 20, 2026 to shareholders of record on May 6, 2026.

The first quarter showed modest loan contraction driven by payoffs and refinancings, but credit quality remained exceptionally strong with no nonaccrual loans and lower watch list balances, while deposits fell sequentially due to normal cash flow fluctuations. Improved net interest margin, a lower cost of deposits, a better efficiency ratio and a higher tangible common equity ratio underpinned stronger profitability and capital, reinforcing the bank’s conservative risk profile and supporting its ability to sustain shareholder returns.

The most recent analyst rating on (WTBA) stock is a Hold with a $24.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on West Bancorporation stock, see the WTBA Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, WTBA is a Neutral.

WTBA scores in the upper-middle range driven most by improved balance-sheet risk profile and a positive earnings outlook (margin expansion, deposit improvement, pristine credit). The score is capped by the weak/erratic cash-flow data and the 2025 revenue contraction, while supportive technical momentum and reasonable valuation with a ~3.9% dividend provide additional backing.

To see Spark’s full report on WTBA stock, click here.

More about West Bancorporation

West Bancorporation, Inc., headquartered in West Des Moines, Iowa, is the parent of community bank West Bank, which has served customers since 1893. The bank focuses on lending, deposit and trust services for small- to medium-sized businesses and consumers, operating branches in the Des Moines and Coralville markets in Iowa and four cities in Minnesota, including Rochester and St. Cloud.

The company’s regional community banking model positions it to compete for relationship-based commercial and retail clients. Its franchise emphasizes balance-sheet strength, credit quality and core deposit gathering across its Midwestern footprint, supporting stable earnings and consistent capital returns to shareholders through regular dividends.

West Bancorporation, Inc. reported first quarter 2026 net income of $10.6 million, or $0.61 per diluted share, up from $7.4 million in the fourth quarter of 2025 and $7.8 million a year earlier, reflecting a 34.8 percent year-over-year profit increase as net interest margin expanded. On April 22, 2026, the board declared a regular quarterly dividend of $0.25 per share, payable May 20, 2026 to shareholders of record on May 6, 2026.

The first quarter showed modest loan contraction driven by payoffs and refinancings, but credit quality remained exceptionally strong with no nonaccrual loans and lower watch list balances, while deposits fell sequentially due to normal cash flow fluctuations. Improved net interest margin, a lower cost of deposits, a better efficiency ratio and a higher tangible common equity ratio underpinned stronger profitability and capital, reinforcing the bank’s conservative risk profile and supporting its ability to sustain shareholder returns.

data.title: Valley National Bancorp Reports Solid First-Quarter 2026 Results
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Valley National Bancorp ( (VLY) ) has provided an update.

Valley National Bancorp reported first-quarter 2026 net income of $163.9 million, or $0.28 per diluted share, down from $195.4 million in the fourth quarter of 2025 but up from $106.1 million a year earlier, with adjusted net income of $168.9 million reflecting improved profitability versus 2025. Management highlighted stable net interest margin at 3.17%, rising net interest income driven by lower deposit costs, and strong growth in core deposits and loans, alongside modestly improving credit quality and a better efficiency ratio, underscoring a strengthened balance sheet despite higher expenses and lower non-interest income.

Total deposits rose to $52.9 billion as of March 31, 2026, propelled by $955 million in direct customer deposit growth and a reduction in higher-cost brokered deposits, while total loans increased to $50.8 billion, led by owner-occupied commercial real estate and relationship-driven C&I lending. The bank maintained an allowance for credit losses at about 1.18% of loans, saw net charge-offs and past-due and non-accrual loans trend lower, and posted first-quarter 2026 annualized ROA of 1.02% and ROTCE of 11.56%, as CEO Ira Robbins emphasized continued strategic hiring and early AI investments to capitalize on a rapidly evolving banking landscape and support more sustainable earnings.

The most recent analyst rating on (VLY) stock is a Buy with a $15.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Valley National Bancorp stock, see the VLY Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on VLY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, VLY is a Neutral.

The score is driven mainly by solid financial performance and a constructive earnings-call outlook (margin expansion, NII growth, deposit improvement, and disciplined expenses). Valuation is supportive with a reasonable P/E and strong dividend yield, while technical indicators are mixed and do not strongly reinforce near-term momentum.

To see Spark’s full report on VLY stock, click here.

More about Valley National Bancorp

Valley National Bancorp, the holding company for Valley National Bank, operates as a regional banking institution providing deposit, lending and wealth management services. The company focuses on growing low-cost core deposits, diversifying its commercial real estate and commercial and industrial loan portfolios, and leveraging technology, including artificial intelligence, to enhance client experience and operational efficiency.

data.title: Fluor Completes Monetization of NuScale Investment Stake
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Fluor ( (FLR) ) is now available.

On April 23, 2026, Fluor Corporation announced it had completed the sale of its remaining 40 million shares of NuScale Power Corporation, generating gross proceeds of $473 million. The transaction caps a total investment of $570 million in NuScale and brings Fluor’s cumulative open-market sale proceeds from the stake to approximately $2.43 billion since September 2025, marking a significant monetization of a strategic holding that could enhance its financial flexibility and capital allocation options.

The exit from NuScale may signal a shift in how Fluor balances direct equity exposure to emerging energy technologies against its core engineering and construction operations. For stakeholders, the sizable realized gains suggest a successful financial outcome from the NuScale investment, potentially strengthening Fluor’s balance sheet and positioning it to redeploy capital into other strategic priorities or shareholder-focused actions.

The most recent analyst rating on (FLR) stock is a Hold with a $40.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Fluor stock, see the FLR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on FLR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FLR is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by sharp 2025 profitability and cash-flow deterioration and ongoing project execution risks, despite a de-risked leverage profile. Offsetting factors include a very low valuation multiple and a moderately constructive outlook from the earnings call (2026 guidance, backlog strength, and significant planned buybacks), while technical signals point to stabilization rather than strong momentum.

To see Spark’s full report on FLR stock, click here.

More about Fluor

Fluor Corporation operates in the engineering and construction industry, providing project management and related services for large-scale energy, infrastructure, and industrial clients. The company often undertakes capital-intensive projects and makes strategic investments in emerging technologies and partners to support its long-term growth and portfolio diversification.

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

The latest update is out from Bread Financial Holdings ( (BFH) ).

On April 23, 2026, Bread Financial reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, highlighted by a return to loan growth and improving credit quality, with net income rising to $181 million, revenue up 5% year over year and end-of-period loans increasing 2%. The company boosted shareholder returns through retiring 3.5 million shares, expanding its stock repurchase authorization by $600 million, repurchasing subordinated debt and declaring higher quarterly cash dividends on both its preferred and common stock, while new partnerships with brands such as Ford, Ethan Allen, AAA and Dell underscored its push to deepen sector diversification and reinforce its competitive position in payment and lending solutions.

Credit sales grew 7% to $6.5 billion, driven by new partner growth and resilient consumer spending, especially among younger demographics and in verticals such as health and beauty, jewelry and travel. Management emphasized disciplined credit risk and capital management as delinquency and net loss rates improved versus a year earlier, CET1 capital rose to 13.3%, tangible book value per share increased 26% and the company reiterated its 2026 outlook for low single-digit loan and revenue growth, positive operating leverage and a net loss rate in the low-7% range.

The most recent analyst rating on (BFH) stock is a Hold with a $91.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bread Financial Holdings stock, see the BFH Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Tsingtao Brewery Director Resigns, Triggering Board Committee Changes
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Tsingtao Brewery Co ( (HK:0168) ) is now available.

Tsingtao Brewery announced the resignation of independent non-executive director Sheng Lei Ming, who has served since June 2020 and is stepping down as his six-year term approaches under relevant regulatory requirements. Sheng is also resigning as chairman of the Nomination & Remuneration Committee and as a member of the Audit & Internal Control Committee, and he has confirmed there is no disagreement with the board or matters needing shareholder attention.

His departure leaves the Nomination & Remuneration Committee without a chair, putting the brewer temporarily out of compliance with Hong Kong listing rules that require this role to be filled by an independent non-executive director. The company plans to appoint a suitable replacement within three months to restore compliance and will issue a further announcement, while the board publicly thanked Sheng for his contributions during his tenure.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:0168) stock is a Buy with a HK$67.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tsingtao Brewery Co stock, see the HK:0168 Stock Forecast page.

More about Tsingtao Brewery Co

Tsingtao Brewery Company Limited is a major Chinese beer producer operating as a Sino-foreign joint stock company listed in Hong Kong. The group focuses on brewing and distributing beer and related beverages, serving both domestic and international markets under the well-known Tsingtao brand.

Average Trading Volume: 3,932,733

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$82.97B

data.title: Wai Kee to Replace Deloitte With Crowe as Auditor After 33 Years
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Wai Kee Holdings Limited ( (HK:0610) ) has shared an update.

Wai Kee Holdings Limited has announced a planned change of auditor, with Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu set to retire after the conclusion of the annual general meeting on 22 May 2026, ending more than 33 years in the role. The board and audit committee, citing auditor rotation as being in the best interests of shareholders, will propose the appointment of Crowe (HK) CPA Limited as the new auditor, subject to shareholder approval and completion of Crowe’s client acceptance procedures.

In selecting Crowe, the audit committee assessed audit fees, industry knowledge, independence, proposed audit services, technical competence, capacity and compliance with Hong Kong regulatory guidelines, and concluded Crowe is suitable for the mandate. The company and Deloitte both confirmed there is no disagreement between them, aside from issues previously disclosed in a modified audit opinion related to the going concern of Road King Infrastructure Limited and its restructuring, and a circular detailing the proposed appointment and AGM notice will be sent to shareholders in due course.

More about Wai Kee Holdings Limited

Wai Kee Holdings Limited is a Hong Kong–listed company incorporated in Bermuda and traded under stock code 610. It operates as an investment holding group with interests including infrastructure-related businesses through subsidiaries such as Road King Infrastructure Limited, focusing on projects that are subject to Hong Kong financial reporting and listing regulations.

The company is overseen by a board comprising executive and independent non-executive directors, supported by an audit committee that evaluates auditor performance, independence and suitability. Its operations and governance are closely aligned with the requirements of the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong and the Accounting and Financial Reporting Council guidelines.

Average Trading Volume: 82,781

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$729.7M

data.title: Clean Energy Technologies Faces Nasdaq Non-Compliance Over 10-K
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Clean Energy Technologies ( (CETY) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 17, 2026, Clean Energy Technologies, Inc. disclosed it had received a notice from Nasdaq stating the company was not in compliance with listing rules because it had not yet filed its Form 10-K for the year ended December 31, 2025. The notice does not immediately affect the listing or trading of its securities, and the company is working to complete and file the overdue annual report.

Under Nasdaq procedures, Clean Energy Technologies has 60 days from receipt of the notice to submit a plan to regain compliance, with a potential extension of up to 180 days from the original Form 10-K due date if that plan is accepted. The company warned that a potential delisting could reduce stock liquidity and price, constrain access to public capital markets, limit investor interest and impair its ability to offer equity incentives to employees.

Spark’s Take on CETY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CETY is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by very weak profitability and negative operating/free cash flow, despite strong revenue growth and healthy gross margins. Technicals add further pressure due to a pronounced downtrend (price well below key moving averages and negative MACD). Valuation is constrained by losses (negative P/E), while recent capital raises and a strategic investment modestly offset risk by improving funding and optionality but introduce dilution.

To see Spark’s full report on CETY stock, click here.

More about Clean Energy Technologies

Clean Energy Technologies, Inc. is a clean energy company whose securities are listed on the Nasdaq Stock Market. The company relies on public equity markets for liquidity, capital raising and the use of equity-based incentives for employees, making continued compliance with Nasdaq listing standards important to its operations and financing flexibility.

Average Trading Volume: 657,345

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $4.29M
